titleStmt.title: SII 38.501: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 501. (A.R. No. 501 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the west wall, first prākāra, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakkaravatti Rājarāja III Year: 16+1st Karkaṭaka, śu. di. 3 Wednesday, Pūśam = 21st July 1232 A.D.

summary.p: Registers the sale of 1(3/4) vēli, 2 mā of dry land, 15(1/2) vēli and 2 mā of wet land, garden, house and grazing ground, by Aṟaiyan Mallan alias Birāmādarāya Muttaraiyaṉ of Ūṟṟattūr in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu to his bodyguard (agambadiyār) Śrutimāṉ Nāyaṉ Soṟaṉ alias Iruṇgōḷar of Neṟkuḷam, for 6000 naṟkāśu.
Uḍaiyaṉ Muttayattaṉ Nāṅgūr uḍaiyāṉ Varaṉṉi Āḻvāṉṉāyaṉ Śīmāhēśvara-vēḷāṉ, the accountant of Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu, who wrote this document and several other figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūruvapakkattu tritiyaiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pū[cattu nāḷ vaṭakarai Irājarāja vaḷa]nāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭaraiyaṉ mallaṉ ciyaṉāṉa pi
ramātarāya muttaraiyaṉeṉ Eṉ Akampaṭiyāril neṟkuḷamuṭaiya curitimāṉ ṉāyaṉ coṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku nilavilaip piramāṇa I(c)aivu tiṭṭu Eṉ kāṇiyāy nāṉ viṟkiṉṟa vaṭapāṭāvūr naṉcey puṉcey maṉaikkum Ellaiyāvatu pāṇṭaneri Eṉṟu per kū
vappaṭṭa kuḷattukkum naṉceyviḷainilattukkum Ellaiyāvatu vaṭapāṟkellai kuṭamuruṭṭi kaṟaṭṭukku teṟku Ayyaṉ pātti meṭṭukku teṟkum puṟkuḷattu Ellai caṭaiyāṇṭār vaṭṭattukkum poṉṉāṇṭār vaṭṭattukku Ūraṉ Eṉ
ṟa nilattukku teṟkum Itaṉ meṟku kuḷattu nir koval Ayyaṉār taṇakkāṇṭār koyilukkum Itaṉ meṟku caṭuppar kiṇaṟṟukkum tāḻaikkuṭṭattu karaikkum koyi kkum paṟaiccerikku kiḻakkum teṉpāṟkellai A
ya puḷikku vaṭakkum Itaṉ kiḻakku marutampaḷḷattu kiḻakkum kiḻpāṟkellai pūṇaikkaṟaṭṭukku meṟku y viṭṭu kaṟaṭṭukku meṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai naṭuvu Uṭpaṭṭa nilam patiṉālaṭiyum vilakkaṭiyumāṉa ko
nilam � Itil Eṉṉopāti nālil Oṉṟu » � Orumā Itil Uṭaiyāṉ Aṇṇanāṅkāṟparaiyaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭāṟku Urimai ceyyā Ivarkaḷ peṟṟuṭaiyā Aṉupokittu varukiṟa pala taṭiyāl rūpāy 9 nikki » mukkāl Iraṇṭumā Iṉṉilam mukkāle Iraṇ
ṭumāvum Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kaḷar Iṟaṅkalum nirkovalum Uṭpaṭavum puṟkuḷattukkum naṉcey nilattukkum Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai kuṭamuruṭṭi kaṟaṭṭukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai pāṇṭaneriellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ayyaṉār ta
ṇakkāṇṭār koyilukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai puṟkuḷattu nirkoval Ūrāṇṭāṉpaḷḷattukku teṟkum Āka Icainta perunāṉkellai naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey patiṉālaṭiyum vilakkaṭiyumāṉa kolāl Uttecappaṭi naṉcey » 4 � Itil nilaṅkala
Eṉṉopāti nālil Oṉṟu » 1 li Iṉṉilam veliyum puṉcey nilattukku vaṭapāṭāvūr nilamum Āvattaṉārkuṟicci nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu vaṭapāṟkellai taraṇikku pokiṟa vaḻikku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai pūṉaikaṟaṭṭukkum cūḷai
meṭṭukkum vaḻukkal kallukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ūṟṟattūr Ellaiyil peṟci kuḻikkum kaḷiyaṉkuṟicci Ellaiyil kucavaṉ kuḻikkum koḷkiṟāṉ kāṇiyāṉa neṭuṅkūr Ellaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai neṭuṅkūr Ellaiyil tukumāṇṭāṉ ku
ḻikkuk kiḻakkum teṉ pāṭāvūr Ellaiyil Ūṟaiṉāṭāḻvāṉ pālan ceykku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai maṇiyaṉkuṟiccikku pokiṟa peruvaḻikku teṟkum Itaṉ kiḻakku Aracaṉ pāḻikaraiyil nakarattār matuḷukkum paṟaiccerikkum teṟkum Āka Icainta peru nā
Ellai naṭuvupaṭa puṉceyyum kuḷamum Uṭpaṭa patiṉāṟaṭiyum vilakkaṭiyum Āṉa kolāl mikutikkuṟaivu 2 10 Utteca paṭi rūpāy » 10 4 Itil Eṉṉopāti nālil Oṉṟu paṭutaraṅkāṇi kuḷamum naṉcey ttalām nilamum Ūrppuṉcey rūpāy 10 3 » 2yum Iṅku viṭ
ṭu vaṭakku vaṭapāṭāvūr vuṭparappil puṉcey nilattukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻpāṟkellai paramalai Ellaikku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai Ayyaṉār taṇakkāṇṭār koyilukku kiḻakkum ṭa pāl kku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai teṉpāṭāvūr Ellaikku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai
kūmpaṉ Ellaikku teṟkum Āka Icainta (perunāṉku) perunāṉkellai naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa puṉcey Uttecam » vuli Itil Eṉṉopāti nālil Oṉṟu » 2 liyum maṉaikkum toṭṭattukkum Ellaiyāvatu melpāṟkellai nakarattār matuḷukku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟkellai teṉpāṭāvūr Ellaiyil Ellaik kallukku teṟkum Itaṉ kiḻakku teṉpāṭāvūr Ellai vaṉṉiteventirap pallavaraiyar maṉaikku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai vaṭakku nokki pokiṟa teruvil Ellaikkallukku kiḻakkum peri maṉṟil cāntipiṭa
ttukku teṟkum kucavaṉakattukkut teṟku nokki pokiṟa teruvil Ellai kallukku meṟkum Ivvellai kallukku kiḻakku teṉpāṭāvūr Ellai poṉmāḷiyār toṭṭattukku teṟkum kiḻpāṟkellai nakarattār matuḷukku meṟkum teṉpāṟkellai nakarattār ma
tuḷukku vaṭakkum Āka Icainta peru nāṉkellai naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa maṉaiyum toṭṭamum maṉṟum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum ṉṟum Iraiy mutala yā vilai koṇṭuviṭṭa maṉaiyum toṭṭamum Uṭ kuṭuttuk koḷvatāṉa Emmilicainta vilaipporuḷaṉṟāṭu na
ṟkācu 6 1000 Ikkācu Āṟāyirattukkum Iṉta naṉceynilam Oṉṟe mukkāle Iraṇṭumāvum puṉceynilam patiṉañcaraiye Irumāvaraiyum maṉaiyum toṭṭamum maṉṟum kaṉṟunilaipāḻum Iḷaiya mutaliyār vilaikoṇṭa maṉaiyum toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭa Ikkācu Āṟāyira
ttukkum viṟṟu Āvaṇakkaḷiye kāṭṭeṟṟi kaiccelavaṟa koṇṭu viṟṟu vilaipiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭukkuṭutteṉ nāyaṉ coṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku mallaṉ ciyaṉāna piramātarāya muttaraiya neṉ Innilattukkum maṉaikku toṭṭattukkum maṉṟum kaṉṟum nilaipāḻu
kkum meṉokkiṉa marattukkum kiḻnokkiya kiṇaṟṟukkum maṟṟum Eppe(o)ṟpaṭṭa pirāttikaḷu Ituve poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷ celaolaiyāvatu Ākavum Ituvallatu veṟu poruḷ māvaṟutip poruḷc celaolai kāṭṭak kaṭavatallaātākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu viṟṟu vilai
ppiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭuk kuṭutten nāyaṉcoṟaṉāṉa Iruṅkoḷaṉukku mallanciyanāṉa piramātarāyamuttaraiyaneṉ Ippaṭi cammatittu Ikkācu Āṟāyiramum koṇṭu nilavilaip piramāṇam paṇṇi kuṭutteṉ mallaṉciyaṉāṉapiramātarāya muttaraiyaneṉ Ivai Eṉneḻuttu
Innilavilaippiramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu Eḻutineṉ Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭu kaṇakkukāṇi Uṭaiya muttayattaṉ nāṅkūruṭaiyāṉ vāraṉṉiyāḻvānṉāyaṉ cimākecuraveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Itu ciyan mallaṉāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻa piramātarāya muttaraiyaṉum Ivan tampi co
ḻakoṉ cayiñāṉa taṉmaikkum Ivai piramātarāya muttaraiyaneḻuttu Ivai teṉpāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimān vāḻavantāṉāyaṉ cempiyaṉ cayiñāṉatanmaikku Ivai toṇṭapparama Uṭaiyān Uṭaiyapiḷḷai Eḻuttu Itu Uṭaiyān Aṇṇā nāṅkāṟap piriyaṉ ca
yiñāṉataṉmaikku Ivai paḻuvūruṭaiyāṉ centāmaraik kaṇṇaṉ tiruvaikāvuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Itu vaṭapāṭāvūruṭaiya curutimāṉ Ūrpiyaraṉ metāvi raiyaṉ cayiñāṉataṉmaikku Ivai toṇ Uṭaiyāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭān piramappiriyaneḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟi
veṉ Ilakkiccāṉacāṉavittate mupiṭi Eḻuttu Itu palatevaṉ Āka cayiña tanmaikku Ivai pāyilaṅkai ḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ pāṭāvūr kāṇiyuṭaiya rāṉ
Upakāri Iḷaiyān vaṭakopuram Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ cuṭṭiyaṉ taāyilunallappaneḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 38.501 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
